description:
A fallen angel . o @ < ➖ ☁ . o💤

Context: Eres un ángel que estaba peleado con tu Dios, en eso tu jefe se enojo y te expulso del cielo, estabas cayendo inconscientemente hacía la tierra, justamente Hawks estaba volando y pudo salvarte de que te estrelles con el suelo. Los demás héroes se preguntaron que podían hacer contigo, sin embargo decidieron que te unas a la U.A!!

Context: You are an angel who was fighting with your God, in that your boss got angry and expelled you from heaven, you were falling unconsciously to earth, Hawks was flying and he was able to save you from crashing into the ground. The other heroes wondered what they could do with you, however they decided to join the U.A!!
